affiliations_period_check.name: affiliations_period_check
affiliations_period_check.value: "affiliations"."valid_to" is null or "affiliations"."valid_from" is null or "affiliations"."valid_to" > "affiliations"."valid_from"

artifact_assets_type_matches_content_che.name: artifact_assets_type_matches_content_check
artifact_assets_type_matches_content_che.value: ("artifact_assets"."asset_type" = 'FILE' and "artifact_assets"."file_object_id" is not null) or ("artifact_assets"."asset_type" = 'EXTERNAL_URL' and "artifact_assets"."external_url" is not null)

artifact_reviews_final_fields_check.name: artifact_reviews_final_fields_check
artifact_reviews_final_fields_check.value: "artifact_reviews"."status" <> 'FINAL' or ("artifact_reviews"."score" is not null and "artifact_reviews"."decision" is not null and "artifact_reviews"."reviewed_at" is not null)

cohorts_period_check.name: cohorts_period_check
cohorts_period_check.value: "cohorts"."ends_at" is null or "cohorts"."starts_at" is null or "cohorts"."ends_at" > "cohorts"."starts_at"

contact_points_period_check.name: contact_points_period_check
contact_points_period_check.value: "contact_points"."valid_to" is null or "contact_points"."valid_from" is null or "contact_points"."valid_to" > "contact_points"."valid_from"

events_period_check.name: events_period_check
events_period_check.value: "events"."ends_at" is null or "events"."starts_at" is null or "events"."ends_at" > "events"."starts_at"

import_runs_period_check.name: import_runs_period_check
import_runs_period_check.value: "import_runs"."finished_at" is null or "import_runs"."started_at" is null or "import_runs"."finished_at" >= "import_runs"."started_at"

merge_operations_revert_fields_check.name: merge_operations_revert_fields_check
merge_operations_revert_fields_check.value: "merge_operations"."status" = 'APPLIED' or ("merge_operations"."reverted_at" is not null and "merge_operations"."reverted_by_user_id" is not null and "merge_operations"."revert_reason" is not null)

person_aliases_period_check.name: person_aliases_period_check
person_aliases_period_check.value: "person_aliases"."valid_to" is null or "person_aliases"."valid_from" is null or "person_aliases"."valid_to" > "person_aliases"."valid_from"

programs_period_check.name: programs_period_check
programs_period_check.value: "programs"."ends_at" is null or "programs"."starts_at" is null or "programs"."ends_at" > "programs"."starts_at"

project_team_links_period_check.name: project_team_links_period_check
project_team_links_period_check.value: "project_team_links"."valid_to" is null or "project_team_links"."valid_from" is null or "project_team_links"."valid_to" > "project_team_links"."valid_from"

projects_period_check.name: projects_period_check
projects_period_check.value: "projects"."ends_at" is null or "projects"."starts_at" is null or "projects"."ends_at" > "projects"."starts_at"

tasks_subject_check.name: tasks_subject_check
tasks_subject_check.value: "tasks"."person_id" is not null or "tasks"."project_id" is not null

team_memberships_period_check.name: team_memberships_period_check
team_memberships_period_check.value: "team_memberships"."valid_to" is null or "team_memberships"."valid_from" is null or "team_memberships"."valid_to" > "team_memberships"."valid_from"
